scene: A frazzled doodle stick figure clutching its head in frustration, surrounded by floating question marks. Flat warm yellow background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

Two ancient Greek philosophers in togas and laurel wreaths stroking their beards and arguing, a small thought bubble between them showing a tiny figure choosing a worse, thorny path over a smooth one. Flat terracotta background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A proud ancient Greek philosopher holding up a blank stone tablet with a glowing aura, presenting it like an important discovery. Flat deep blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A doodle stick figure shoving a heavy task box off the edge of today toward a big sun rising on the horizon, kicking it into tomorrow. Flat sunset orange background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
